original: From the waist up, she is almost shockingly human. Only her long, feathery ears and arms covered in more ruddy plumage mark her out as any different. There are her yellow eyes you suppose, filled with a fury bordering on the divine; few women you know of would go bare-breasted and daub themselves in blue dye also. She has short, messy red hair in keeping with her plumage, and pale skin. The pretty, pert softness on her chest is maybe a B cup by human standards. She is lithe and clearly quite fit, fit enough to carry and fire the scrap-built crossbow in her hands. The ugly, ingenious thing has a fiber-cable string and its bolts, slung in a quiver over her back, are fletched with her own feathers. Attached to a belt around her fetchingly svelte waist are a cluster of stoppered bottles and charms, fashioned from clay and badlands clink.
[var0|The|Gritting her teeth against the pain, the] shalin spreads her wings wide and charges at you.\n\n\t\t“Desert waves and Kiha braves! Aiaiaiaiaiaiaiai!”
You duck and roll under her wing, a great wind brushing over your shoulders.

{var0}?{var3}({var2}({var2}(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you and you are sent pinwheeling into the dirt. You are tripped."]))):{var6}({var5}({var4}(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you, far harder than any delicate limb of flight has a right to be. You are sent skidding backwards, but thankfully are able to stay upright."])))
context: <> <> combatAppend(o?textify(i||(i=(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you and you are sent pinwheeling into the dirt. You are tripped."]))):textify(s||(s=(0,b.Z)(["The wing slams into you, far harder than any delicate limb of flight has a right to be. You are sent skidding backwards, but thankfully are able to stay upright."]))))

original: Hawk eyes locked on you, the bird-taur lifts her crossbow to her shoulder and fires, the dead thunk of its mechanism merging with her ululating battle screech into one dreadful sound. [var0|The bolt slams into you with the force of a meteor. [flags.SHALIN_SHAMAN_ARROW|Once again you feel the searing pain of the poison she dips her arrows in.|Aargh the dart is covered in some horrendous burning goo as well! It makes your veins feel like they’re on fire!]|You feint, and the bolt misses you by a whisker.] [var1||In an elegant dance-like movement, the shalin slots another bolt into the crossbow’s rail, dips it towards the ground, catches its lever with a foot talon and, with a ‘croo,’ reloads by stepping heavily down.]

“Carry me Toth! Hold me eastern winds, sing with me! Ahahaaaaiiiii!”\n\n\t\tThe shalin sprints towards you with her wings open and then is not sprinting, is sweeping over and beyond you into the sky. She swoops and circles over you, eyes wild and mouth open with the rarefied joy of flight and battle. You won’t be able to hit her with melee attacks whilst she’s up there.

The shalin’s singing grows louder and more distant as she cuts and sweeps over you, wings extended, raising the dust of the battlefield into a gritty cloud. As she does so, loose feathers from her under-coverage rain down around you. Incredibly sharp and resilient things, nothing so much as a sudden shower of knives[var0| pelt your body|, to which you fortunately dodge]. [var1|Inevitably the dust gets into your eyes and you are blinded.|You successfully shield your eyes from the miniature sandstorm.]

The shalin appears to pause in mid-air, frozen there in a perfect moment of grace. And then she’s descending towards you, fast, so fast, her talons extended and curled. K E E E E E E E E E L. [var0|She dives into you with all her weight, and only the fact you were throwing yourself backwards already saves your back from being broken. You’re tumbling, scrambling, doing everything you can to escape those cruel, tearing talons that scrabble over your body, searching for purchase.|You’ve been waiting for her to do this, and the moment you see her begin her dive bomb you are running towards her, taking yourself out of the angle of descent. She tears into the dirt behind you, snarling with frustration as her talons grasp nothing but dirt.]

The shalin’s pale cheeks have become quite rosy. She grits her teeth, livid eyes eyeing your body, and her hand descends to the little collection of trinkets and containers she keeps strung around her waist.\n\n\t\t“With mirrors and masks the demon tries to grasp, but - ulp--” She throws the metallic phial in her hand back and shudders. When her eyes return to you they are contracted back to black points, a cold sense of focus tightening her face. “--they are nothing but flimsy tricks! Aaaarraakisonissss! Away black thoughts, to me eastern wind!”

There’s a distant high cry of pain, and you see the shalin’s wing almost turn back on itself. The bird woman seems to hover up there for a moment. Surely she can’t... no, no she can’t. You take a hurried step back as she comes hurtling down to earth with a bloodcurdling scream. WHUMP.

[var0 |You wave away the cloud of dust thrown up by the impact. You see a red-tipped wing being spread, a talon being extended in search of footing, the slow, deliberate actions of the very stunned... and then they falter and give up. This bird is cooked. She sings to herself quietly in a minor note, facing away from you. Your eyes travel down her flank, her grand wings, her fan tail, her chunky thighs and downy underbelly. You suppose, potentially, there’s fun to be had there. |You wave away the cloud of dust thrown up by the impact, behold the Icarian colossus. For a moment you allow yourself to believe your quick thinking and shooting have finished her... and then, with slow, murderous intent, she clambers back to her feet, eyes and hair flaming. Her wings hang limply at her side now, too hurt to function, but she hasn’t given up. She looks like a goose on a towpath. “By earth or by air, no change demon, no change. Aiaiaiaiaiaiaai! I grasp you, I cast you out!” ]

The shalin squawks with pain as your attack hits home. She tries to raise her wings once again, but she no longer can; they hang limply by her side, dragging in the dirt. She glares at you, hurt and furious.\n\n\t\t\t“By earth or by air, no change demon, no change. Aiaiaiaiaiaiaai! I grasp you, I cast you out!”

Your tease attack is telegraphed to the shalin’s acute senses and she’s on the move. She flawlessly repositions herself and strikes a new pose, bringing one of her great red wings up and over her eyes to obsure your lustful display.\n\n\t\t\t\t“See-through demon,” she trills. “Fiddle with your mirror some more.”

The shalin’s audible pants and blushed cheeks make it clear that your tease was successful. Her attempt to cover her eyes with her great red wings was for naught.\n\n\t\t\t\t“S-seducer...” she huffs. “You will not entice me so easily!”

The moment you aim your attack at the shalin’s humanoid torso, she’s on the move. She sweeps herself around like a flamenco dancer, bringing one of her great red wings up and deflecting the blow away with it.\n\n\t\t\t“See-through demon,” she trills. “Fiddle with your mirror some more.”

From the waist down she has the body of a gigantic hawk, reddish plumage on her torso and inner feathers, spreading outwards into whites and handsome black tips on the alars and humerals. Attached to chunky thighs are feet that put the fear of the Jurassic in you, spread yellow claws a foot in length with knife-like talons that, thanks to the unearthly composition of these beings, are perfectly capable of tearing through steel.

With rapid, jerky motions the shalin is suddenly over your fallen form. You gasp as a keratinous crusher claw grasps you by the chest, lifts you from the dirt, then pounds you mercilessly back down into it. And again. And again.\n\t\t \n\t\t“To the dust, yes. To the dust, yes. To the dust, yes! Kihalanosaaaaaaar!”

“[silly|Meep meep!|Kirikerikirikerikirrrrrrekek!]”\n\n\t\tThe shalin charges at you with long, craning strides, an ostrich in sixth gear. When she nears you, she jumps with her wings outstretched so that she can reach out with one set of diamond-hard talons and swipe at you - not to grab or crush but to pierce and slash, a savage, spiteful act. [var0|Her cruel claws rip right through your [pc.isNude|[pc.skinFurScales]|[pc.clothes]]. You are sundered!|You are able to roll out of the way.]
